_meta.name: Meridian MD Design System
_meta.base: Linear (linear.app), adapted for clinical EMR surfaces
_meta.source_of_truth: src/tokens/tokens.json plus AGENTS.md, docs/agent-interface.md, and public/registry.json

panel._use: Card surface. Lifted +1.12 from canvas so elevation reads. (Was #0f1011 — invisible lift.)

muted._use: Metadata, labels. Tuned for AAA on lifted panel (was #9fa4ae — failed at 6.67:1).

pairings._doc: Legal text-on-surface combinations. Verified AAA (≥7:1 body). Text.muted on panel passes 7.88:1 (was the Evidence-strip bug; tokens.text.muted tightened to fix).

rules._note: FAILS AAA on nested surfaces. Use text.secondary on card.

banned_patterns.rule: No card inside a card inside a card. Max nesting depth = 2 (panel > card).
Never use #fff as text color. Use --text (#f7f8f8). Exception: active pill in SegmentedControl (high contrast required).
Every lifted surface must hit ≥1.12:1 contrast against its parent surface. Smaller lifts are invisible on OLED.
Max font-weight is 590 (strong). No 600/700.
No em dashes in UI copy. OK in chat/docs.
Accent color only for CTAs, active states, selected. Never decorative.
12px font floor. Nothing smaller.
A header is never dimmer/lighter/smaller than its body. Uppercase-tracked-muted-12px is a Label/Meta, not a header.
No hero titles, no explainer prose, no second-person 'your body' on physician surfaces. Physician voice = terse clinical labels, scannable rows.
4+ peer categories use tabs, not cards.
Single accent only. Status colors are data-viz only, not UI chrome.
Decision cards use 3-row answer-shaped hierarchy (Do / Why / Goal), not equal-weight labeled blocks.
No SOAP-style field cards (Pattern / Mechanism / Intervention / Tracking metric). Use DecisionCard (Do/Why/Goal).
text.muted on surface.card fails AAA (6.0:1). Use text.secondary on nested card surfaces.
If content can't earn high contrast, cut it — do not mute it to fit more in. Cut, don't mute.
Evidence / citations / provenance live as a single-line footer, never as a row or block.
Cards with click-to-expand must not be whole-card draggable. Drag is grip-only (6-dot handle). Prevents drag/click conflict.
After reorder drop, priority numbers must re-number immediately. Never leave stale numeric labels.
Reorder is save-on-drop. No confirm dialog, no 'Save order' button. Persistence feedback is a quiet flash.

Drag interactions must not rely on accent color (drop indicator line, wash, ring). The dragged element's 1:1 motion plus siblings shifting is the signal. Accent is reserved for CTA / active / selected.

AI thread pane opens from the right edge as a fixed panel with a shadow. The pane must not obscure the primary subject element the physician is asking about; the Inline popover handles that case. The old slider-over-content pattern (covers the whole canvas) is banned.
Every AI assistant message must render a source line (model + version, or evidence bundle reference). No sourceless prose on physician surfaces.
Two AI surfaces: Inline popover + push-pane. ⌘K is the keyboard accelerator. AskLauncher is the persistent entry button. No floating chatbots, no sidebar toggles, no third panel.

AI triggers inside content use neutral borders + text-muted. No accent color. Exception: the AskLauncher FAB uses inverted colors (bg-text on text-bg) because it must register as the single always-visible AI entry point.
AI-generated UI must import Meridian primitives and clinical components. Do not recreate a component that exists in src/primitives or src/clinical.
Generated UI must be based on tokens.json, AGENTS.md, and docs/agent-interface.md. Do not generate from screenshots alone.
Figma component names, code component names, and registry item names must match unless a migration note explains the alias.
Every registry item must include an AI reproduction prompt and a forbidden-pattern list.

density._doc: Meridian uses 'comfortable' only. Reading > scanning. Compact reserved for flowsheets.

agent_contract._doc: Machine-readable rules for AI coding agents and Figma MCP extraction. These do not change visual DNA; they make the DS portable and enforceable.
